seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Lamington and West Lyons River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Lamington vs West Lyons River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Lamington and West Lyons River.
heading: West Lamington vs West Lyons River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Lamington, Western Australia and West Lyons River, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Lyons River has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to West Lamington (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Lamington or West Lyons River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Lamington has a flood risk score of 60/100, while West Lyons River scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Lamington scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. West Lyons River scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Lamington or West Lyons River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Lyons River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
